name: SongGeneration MCP
description: AI music generation from text prompts via 4 backends (Lyria, Stable Audio, MusicGen, Studio SG2)
author: sandraschi
requirements: CUDA GPU recommended for local models

tools.name: song_generate
tools.description: Generate music from text prompt using available backends

tools.name: song_export
tools.description: Export generated track to Plex, Reaper, or VirtualDJ
